channel.title: Eternal Record
channel.description: Daily cinematic mythology stories — 90-second vertical videos.
channel.itunes:author: Ayush Rana

item.title: The Downfall of King Vena
item.description: Today's story will change how you see everything... In the ancient kingdom of the Anu dynasty, King Vena ruled with an iron fist, crushing any opposition and silencing dissent. His people lived in fear of his wrath, their creativity and innovation suffocated by his oppressive regime. But as time passed, King Vena's grip on power tightened. He grew complacent, relying on his powerful bodyguards to maintain order. He stopped attending royal gatherings, choosing instead to spend his days lounging on his throne, surrounded by the opulence of his palace. His people whispered among themselves, 'This is the consequence of sloth – a ruler who neglects his duty, loses touch with his people, and ultimately, loses his kingdom.' And so, a group of brave sages decided to take action, using their collective strength to overthrow the idle king. They struck down Vena with a mighty blow, ending his reign of terror and restoring balance to the kingdom. This is Sloth – the sin of complacency, of neglecting one's duties, and of losing sight of what truly matters.
